transactions.cancelConfirmDesc: The transaction is marked CANCELLED and removed from revenue. Loyalty points & customer visits, redeemed points, and voucher quota are automatically reverted. This action is final and cannot be undone.
transactions.emptyHint: Try changing the date range or clearing active filters.
transactions.refundConfirmDesc: The transaction is marked REFUNDED and removed from revenue. Loyalty points & customer visits, redeemed points, and voucher quota are automatically reverted. Make sure the funds have been returned to the customer. This action is final.
transactions.sourceBookingTitle: Booking customer — came from a prior reservation
transactions.sourceWalkInTitle: Walk-in customer — paid directly without a booking

shift.confirmCloseDesc: You are about to close the shift. Total revenue for this shift is:

customer.bookingSuccessDesc: Thank you, we'll contact you shortly.

branches.title: Branches
branches.quotaReached: {{package}} plan branch limit ({{max}} branches) reached. Upgrade your plan to add more branches.
branches.upgradeToAdd: Upgrade plan to add more branches
branches.feeWarning: Free branch quota exhausted. Adding this branch will cost {{fee}} {{period}}.
branches.feeInvoiceNote: This fee will be recorded to your subscription invoice history.
branches.feeMonthlyNote: It will be billed every month while the branch is active.
branches.suspendedContactAdmin: Tenant account is suspended. Contact super admin.
branches.codeInvalid: Branch code may only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
branches.codeTaken: Branch code already taken, choose another
branches.branchCreatedInvoiceSent: Branch "{{name}}" created. Invoice sent to super admin for confirmation.
branches.suspendedDesc: All operations are disabled. Contact super admin for reactivation.
branches.expiredDesc: Branches over quota are unlicensed. Contact super admin to renew.
branches.overdueDesc: Settle the bill soon to avoid service interruption.
branches.planLimitInfo: The {{package}} plan only supports {{max}} branches. Upgrade to Pro or Enterprise for unlimited branches.
branches.addonActivationNote: Add-on branches activate after super admin confirms payment. Transfer to the listed account, then reach out via a ticket.
branches.checkConnectionRetry: Check your internet connection and try again.
branches.emptyDesc: Add your first branch to start operating.
branches.unlicensedWarning: This branch exceeds the plan quota. The POS cannot operate until the license is active.
branches.upgradeCtaDesc: Upgrade to <pro>Pro</pro> (max 5 branches) or <ent>Enterprise</ent> (unlimited). Contact super admin or open the billing page.
branches.addonFeeWarning: This branch is outside the plan quota. A fee of {{fee}} will apply. An invoice will be created and sent to super admin.
branches.feeModalNote: The branch is created immediately but stays unlicensed until the invoice is confirmed by super admin.
branches.deleteConfirmDesc: Branch {{name}} will be deleted along with all its configuration.
branches.wilayahHint: Branch Area (optional) — default district/village for customers in POS

staff.title: Staff
staff.emailLoginHintNew: Staff will log in with this email. A password will be generated and shown once after saving.
staff.emailLoginHintEdit: Changing the email also changes the staff's login.
staff.baseSalaryHintFixed: Paid flat each month, independent of revenue.
staff.baseSalaryHintKasir: Cashier earns a fixed monthly salary.
staff.isBarberHint: For small shops — this cashier also cuts hair. Their name will appear in barber pick lists at the till, with commission and rating tracked.
staff.barberCommissionHint: Example: 0.35 = 35% of services they perform (on top of base salary).
staff.resetPasswordWarningDetail: Once reset, the staff is logged out from all devices. You can set a custom password below, or leave it blank to auto-generate. The password is shown once on the next screen — save it before closing.
staff.newPasswordHint: Minimum 6 characters. Leave blank for the system to create one.
staff.newPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
staff.credentialsWarning: This password is shown only once. Save or copy it now and give it to the staff member. After this dialog closes, the system cannot reveal it again.
staff.deleteConfirmMessage: Staff {{name}} will be deactivated. The account can no longer log in, and their transactions are kept for reports.
staff.addonInvoiceCreated: Extra staff invoice for Rp {{amount}} created. The staff account is LOCKED (cannot log in) until paid in Billing.
staff.lockedPendingAddonHint: This account is locked (cannot log in) until the staff add-on is paid.
staff.emptyDescription: Add your tenant's first staff to start managing the team.
staff.emptyFilteredDescription: Try changing the search query or clearing filters.
staff.overQuotaAddon: You are charged an extra {{price}}/{{unit}} for {{over}} staff over the {{pkg}} quota. Add another branch to get {{perInfo}}, or upgrade your plan.
staff.overQuotaUpgrade: You exceed the {{pkg}} plan quota ({{used}}/{{quota}}). Consider upgrading to a larger plan.
staff.nearQuotaInfo: Staff quota almost full. Staff #{{next}} onward will incur {{price}}/{{unit}}.
staff.roleBarberDesc: Cuts and styles hair. Earns % commission per service.
staff.roleKasirDesc: POS operator. Fixed monthly salary, optionally also cuts.
staff.branchUnlicensedHint: Pay the branch add-on invoice in Billing before assigning staff here.

services.title: Services
services.errDurationMin: Duration must be at least 1 minute
services.descriptionHint: Optional · shown to customers when booking
services.statusActiveDesc: Active: appears in POS, booking, and public pages.
services.statusInactiveDesc: Inactive: saved but cannot be selected.
services.tenantUnknownHint: Make sure you are logged in as a tenant admin.
services.emptyFilteredDesc: Try resetting filters or changing your search query.
services.emptyDesc: Services are used in POS, queue, and public booking. Start by adding your main service.
services.deleteConfirmDesc: Service "{{name}}" will be deleted. Past transactions stay intact, but this service will no longer appear in POS / booking.
services.bulkDeleteDesc: {{count}} services will be deleted. Past transactions stay intact.

customers.title: Customers
customers.reasonAuditNote: The reason is recorded in the point history & audit log.
customers.checkConnectionRetry: Check your connection and try again.
customers.earnConnectionNote: The customer must be linked to the transaction (via name+phone or picked from the list in POS) for points to count. Walk-ins without identity → no points.
customers.ledgerShowingRecent: Showing the latest 50. Older history is available via API.
customers.exportCappedNote: (capped at 5000 rows — filter more specifically for all data)
customers.dormantTitle: Customers with no visit for {{count}}+ days
customers.emptyFilteredDesc: Try resetting filters or changing your search query.
customers.emptyDesc: Customers are recorded automatically on walk-in or booking. You can also add them manually.
customers.deleteConfirmDesc: Customer "{{name}}" will be deleted. Past transactions & bookings stay intact but are no longer linked to this customer.
customers.bulkDeleteDesc: {{count}} customers will be deleted in bulk. Past transactions & bookings stay intact but are no longer linked to these customers. This action cannot be easily undone.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Business performance summary
reports.noTxDataHint: Reports will appear once you have completed transactions.
reports.heatmapHint: Darker = busier. Hour range follows the branch opening hours in the store's timezone. Use it to staff more barbers during peak hours and run promos during quiet ones.
reports.heatmapEmpty: No transactions in this range yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure account and business preferences
settings.notifNewBookingDesc: Notify when a new booking arrives
settings.notifQueueFullDesc: Alert when the queue exceeds capacity
settings.pwdAllRequired: Fill in current password, new password, and confirmation
settings.pwdTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters
settings.contactUpgrade: Contact the SembaPOS team to upgrade
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all your business data (branches, services, staff, customers, products) as a JSON file.
settings.importDataDesc: Restore data from a previously downloaded JSON backup file.
settings.clickToSelectBackup: Click to select a backup file
settings.importWarningDesc: Import will overwrite existing data. Make sure you have backed up first.
settings.waTrialActivated: WhatsApp trial active! Enjoy all WA features free for {{days}} days.
settings.defaultRatingTemplate:
Hi {nama}! Thank you for visiting {toko}.

How was your experience today? Help us by giving a quick rating at the link below:
{link}

It only takes 30 seconds. Your feedback means a lot to us.
settings.reminderRunStarted: Sending started in the background — {{count}} customers will be reminded gradually with random delays.
settings.reminderRunNone: No customers currently meet the reminder criteria.
settings.backupDownloadedDetail: Backup downloaded — {{branches}} branches, {{services}} services, {{staff}} staff, {{customers}} customers
settings.waTestSent: Test message sent. Check the admin WhatsApp.
settings.businessNameHintPost: /book, and transaction emails. Different from "Account Name" (owner dashboard greeting) below.
settings.timezoneHint: The time zone determines the day boundary in reports, transaction times, and daily grouping. Make sure it matches your branch location.
settings.accountNameHintPre: This name is used for the dashboard greeting (“Good Morning, …”) and your avatar initials.
settings.accountNameHintWarn: It does NOT appear on POS receipts or the public booking page
settings.accountNameHintPost: in the card above. Account email & role cannot be changed here.
settings.taxInfoDesc: Fill this in if your business is a company (PT/CV) and needs the company name + tax ID printed on invoices. Leave empty if not relevant.
settings.taxAddressPlaceholder: As per the tax ID document
settings.manageSubscriptionHintPre: Renew your subscription and upgrade your plan on the
settings.txMsgDescPre: Customize the WhatsApp message text sent to customers after a transaction. Use
settings.txMsgDescMid: to insert the customer's name and
settings.txMsgAutoSendMid: feature (available in higher plans). On your plan, what's active is
settings.txMsgAutoSendPost: — the cashier sends the receipt to the customer's WhatsApp with one click from the cashier page (second column below).
settings.txMsgCustomerHint: Opening line of the automatic notification. Transaction details (total, branch, time) are added automatically below it.
settings.txMsgCustomerHintExtra: Requires the WhatsApp Beta feature active & customer notifications enabled.
settings.txMsgShareLabel: Closing line for manual WhatsApp share (cashier)
settings.txMsgShareHint: Closing line when the cashier shares the receipt via the WhatsApp button on the cashier page. The manual share button is automatically hidden when the automatic notification above is active — so customers don't receive two messages.
settings.reminderDesc: Automatically send a WhatsApp message to customers who haven't visited in a while, to bring them back. Messages are sent from the store WhatsApp number connected in the WhatsApp Beta tab.
settings.reminderEnableDesc: The job runs automatically every day at the time you set.
settings.reminderInactiveHint: E.g. 30 = customers who haven't come in for 30 days.
settings.reminderDelayHintPre: Each message is sent with a
settings.reminderDelayHintPost: delay within this range — preventing a back-to-back sending pattern that risks getting the WhatsApp number blocked. At least 5 seconds is recommended. For large recipient lists, use a longer delay.
settings.reminderMessagePlaceholder: Hi {nama}! It's been {hari} days since your last visit to {toko}. We look forward to your next visit 😊
settings.phDaysSince: number of days since last visit
settings.emptyUseDefault: Left empty = use the default text.
settings.reminderNotConnected: Store WhatsApp is not connected — reminders won't be sent until WhatsApp is connected in the WhatsApp Beta tab.
settings.reminderPreviewPost: meet the reminder criteria (based on saved settings).
settings.reminderRunHint: "Send Now" sends immediately to customers who meet the saved criteria, without waiting for the schedule. Store WhatsApp must be connected.
settings.ratingDescPre: Enable this feature so the system automatically sends a rating link to customers after a transaction is complete. Customers are directed to a public page to give stars & comments — you can view them on the
settings.ratingNote: only transactions completed after the feature is enabled will receive the link. Old transactions will not be sent a link so customers aren't bothered.
settings.ratingEnableLabel: Enable sending automatic rating links to customers
settings.ratingEnableDesc: Only customers with a phone number receive the link. Store WhatsApp must be connected.
settings.ratingSendAfterHint: Delay between transaction completion and the link being sent. Default 15 minutes — give the customer time to leave the store first so it isn't awkward.
settings.ratingTemplateHint: Leave empty to use the default template. Variables:
settings.exportDataFullDesc: Download all store data (branches, services, staff, customers) as a JSON file for archiving or backup. Data is fetched directly from the server — always up to date.
settings.waStatusSleeping: Standby (wakes automatically when there's a notification)
settings.waTrialEnds: Ends {{date}}. After that, WhatsApp features lock automatically unless you upgrade to Pro.
settings.waTryFreeDesc: Send receipts, visit reminders & rating links automatically to customers via WhatsApp. Activate now — no cost, no card. The trial can only be taken once.
settings.waBenefitReminder: Reminders for customers who haven't visited in a while
settings.waBenefitRating: Automatic rating links + message status reports
settings.waTrialExpiredDesc: The free trial is over. Upgrade to Pro to reactivate WhatsApp receipts, visit reminders & automatic rating links — plus Advanced Reports, Heatmap, CLV & Regional Reports.
settings.waCardDesc: Connect one WhatsApp number to receive automatic transaction notifications. It works like WhatsApp Web — scan the QR once, then the session is stored on the server.
settings.waQrRefreshNote: The QR refreshes automatically every few seconds.
settings.waScanSuccess: Scan successful — WhatsApp Web is loading data…
settings.waScanTitle: Scan from WhatsApp on your phone
settings.waScanStep1: Open WhatsApp on the phone you'll use as the server number.
settings.waScanStep5: Point the camera at the QR code beside this.
settings.waScanWarn: Don't use a personal number — use a dedicated operational number.
settings.waAutoNotifyDesc: Every POS transaction is sent directly to the admin number.
settings.waNotifyCustomerDesc: Only if the customer's number is recorded in the transaction.
settings.bpThemeDesc: Choose the look of the public booking page. Customers will see it according to this choice.
settings.bpHeroImageLabel: Hero image (banner at the top of the booking page)
settings.bpUploadHero: Click to upload a photo (JPG/PNG/WebP, max 5 MB)
settings.bpGalleryHint: The gallery appears as a photo grid on the public booking page. You can upload many files at once.
settings.bpTestimonialsEmpty: No testimonials yet. Add some to build trust with new customers.
settings.bpPreviewFootnote: The preview only shows relevant sections; the full public page is at {{url}}.

schedule.title: Staff Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Manage weekly barber work schedule
schedule.noBarbers: No barbers yet. Add staff first.
schedule.confirmDeleteDesc: {{name}}'s schedule on {{date}} will be permanently removed.
schedule.copyLastWeekTitle: Copy all schedules from last week
schedule.copyDialogDesc: This will copy all schedules from last week ({{from}} – {{to}}) into this week ({{target}}){{extra}}.
schedule.copyOverwriteWarn: Target week already has {{count}} schedule(s). Choose a mode below.
schedule.dragHint: Drag to move to another day
schedule.emptyCta: Click any cell to add, or copy from last week.
schedule.bulkDeleteConfirmDesc: {{count}} schedule(s) will be permanently removed and cannot be restored.
schedule.clearWeekConfirmDesc: All schedules on {{label}} will be permanently removed.
schedule.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
schedule.wsWarnDayOff: This staff's weekly pattern: DAY OFF. A shift here will override it and become the basis for attendance calculation.
schedule.wsWarnHours: This staff's weekly pattern: {{start}}–{{end}}. The shift hours here will be used to calculate lateness for that day.
schedule.pageSubtitlePre: Plan cashier & barber shifts per date. Base hour patterns are set in
schedule.managePresetsTenantTitle: Manage shift time presets for this tenant
schedule.ghostTitle: Weekly pattern for {{name}} ({{role}}): {{start}}–{{end}}. Click to add as a specific shift.
schedule.ghostLegendPost: Click to add it as a shift specific to that date.
schedule.partialClosedDetail: {{closed}} of {{total}} branches closed on this date.
schedule.noShiftBranchClosed: No shifts because the branch is closed.
schedule.closeModalDesc: All scheduled shifts for this branch & date will be deleted. Public booking should also not accept reservations on this date (requires /book integration).
schedule.reopenModalDesc: The branch will accept bookings & schedules again from this date.
schedule.noteHint: Shown in the calendar when staff/admin view this date.
schedule.obStaffTodoDesc: No barbers yet. Add one first under Staff.
schedule.obPatternDoneDesc: The weekly work-hour pattern is filled in. This pattern appears as a "default" chip in the calendar.
schedule.obPatternTodoDesc: Set default clock-in/out hours per day. This pattern is the basis for lateness calculation & default chips in the calendar.
schedule.obPresetCustomDesc: Shift presets follow the tenant settings.
schedule.obPresetDefaultDesc: Morning 08–14, Afternoon 14–22, Full 08–22. Can be adjusted if your store hours differ.
schedule.obAddDesc: Click an empty calendar cell, or use the button below. If there is a dashed-border chip, click it to use the weekly pattern hours.
schedule.obSubheading: There are no schedules this week. Follow these {{count}} quick steps — most are automatic once your base data is set up.
schedule.obHideTitle: Hide the guide for this week
schedule.presetMinOne: At least one preset is required.
schedule.presetEndAfterStart: For "{{label}}": end time must be after start time.
schedule.presetModalDesc: Presets let admins fill shift hours with one click. You can still set hours manually when adding a schedule. Max 6 presets.

vouchers.title: Vouchers
vouchers.requiredFields: Code, value, and expiry date are required
vouchers.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this voucher? This action cannot be undone.
vouchers.subtitle: Manage tenant discount vouchers
vouchers.bulkDeleteDesc: {{count}} voucher(s) will be permanently removed and cannot be restored.
vouchers.validationExpiryPast: Expiry date must be in the future

branchComparison.title: Branch Comparison
branchComparison.subtitle: Compare performance across branches
branchComparison.minBranchesDesc: Add a second branch to start comparing performance across branches.

billing.title: Billing
billing.pageSubtitle: Your subscription plan and payment information
billing.subscriptionNotFound: Subscription data not found. Contact Platform Admin.
billing.paymentOverdueDesc: Your subscription is past due. Contact Platform Admin for renewal so access is not interrupted.
billing.lockedDesc: Other menus cannot be opened until the subscription is renewed. Choose a package below and complete the payment to reactivate your store.
billing.paymentProcessingDesc: This page will update automatically in a few seconds. If not, refresh the page.
billing.gracePeriodNote: You are in a grace period. After that the account will be deactivated and data will be locked.
billing.securePaymentNote: Secure payment via Duitku — your subscription period is extended automatically once paid.
billing.gatewayInactiveNote: Payment gateway is not active yet. Contact the platform admin for renewal / upgrade.
billing.gatewayInactiveContactAdmin: Payment gateway is not active yet — contact the platform admin.
billing.downgradeContactAdmin: To downgrade, contact the platform admin.
billing.buyBranchLicensePrefix: Buy an additional branch license for
billing.renewPeriodNote: Your subscription period will be extended by {{days}} from the current end date once payment is completed.
billing.upgradeNotePeriod: Subscription period +{{days}} days from the current end date.
billing.pauseExplanation: While paused: auto-renew is turned off and your subscription period is automatically extended by the pause duration when it resumes (the days you already paid for are not lost).
billing.pauseMaxNote: Maximum pause is 30 days. You can resume any time before that date.

dashboard.subtitle: Summary of today's performance
dashboard.ratingNone: No ratings yet · click to view details
dashboard.setupProgress: {{done}} of {{total}} steps complete — finish them to get your store ready.
dashboard.stepBranchDesc: Set your branch name, address, and opening hours.
dashboard.stepServiceDesc: Haircut, wash, shave — set prices & durations.
dashboard.stepStaffDesc: Create login accounts for staff who handle transactions.
dashboard.stepTxDesc: Via a cashier account in the POS menu — proof your store is live.
dashboard.helpCenterCta: Need a full guide? Open the Help Center
dashboard.welcomeDesc: Your 14-day trial is active. Follow the "Store Setup" checklist below — each step is checked off automatically when done.

attendance.pageSubtitle: GPS-based attendance for cashier & barber staff
attendance.featureOffDesc: Digital Attendance is available on the Pro & Enterprise plans. Contact SembaPOS to enable it.
attendance.noRecordsForFilter: No attendance records for this filter.
attendance.noStaffToReport: No cashier/barber staff to report yet.
attendance.reportFootnote: Absent = a scheduled work day with no attendance record. Days off are not counted as work days.
attendance.scheduleInfoPart1: The weekly schedule here is the basis for late calculations. For date-specific barber shifts (Morning/Afternoon/Full),
attendance.scheduleInfoPart2: — if a barber has a shift on a specific date, those hours are used (overriding the weekly schedule).
attendance.enableAttendanceDesc: When disabled, staff cannot check in.
attendance.lateToleranceDesc: Minutes after the start time before being counted as late.
attendance.autoCheckoutDesc: Automatically close attendance forgotten to be checked out at end of day.
attendance.maxGpsAccuracyDesc: Attendance is rejected if GPS accuracy is worse than this value (meters).
attendance.requireSelfieDesc: Staff must take a selfie on every check-in & check-out as proof.
attendance.geofenceDesc: Staff can only check in within the defined radius from the branch coordinates. Open the branch location in Google Maps, or tap “My location” while at the branch.
attendance.gpsNotSupported: This device does not support GPS.
attendance.locationFilled: Location filled in. Don't forget to save.
attendance.coordIncomplete: Fill in complete coordinates (lat & lng) or leave both empty.

expenses.paywallDescPart1: This feature is available on the
expenses.paywallDescPart2: plans. Upgrade your plan to record operational costs and see your business's net profit.
expenses.loadLastMonthFailed: Failed to load last month's data
expenses.payrollIntroPart1: Salary for each staff (barber & cashier) for
expenses.payrollIntroPart3: to auto-fill the expense form. The
expenses.payrollIntroPart4: mark = already recorded as an expense this month.
expenses.loadPayrollFailed: Failed to load staff salary data
expenses.noPayrollInMonth: No staff salaries to pay in {{month}}
expenses.pageSubtitle: Manage operational costs & compute net profit

ratings.featureOffDesc: Enable the "barber_rating" feature in settings to start collecting customer ratings for barbers.
ratings.pageSubtitle: Moderate ratings, manage public testimonials, follow up on customer complaints.
ratings.noMatchHint: Try changing the filter or reset to see all ratings.
ratings.noRatingsHint: Ratings appear here after the cashier submits a rating from the POS payment modal.
ratings.bulkPublishDesc: {{count}} ratings will become public testimonials on /book. Only ratings ≥4★ with a comment are processed; the rest are skipped.
ratings.bulkHideDesc: {{count}} ratings will be hidden from public testimonials. They can be republished later.
ratings.bulkDeleteDesc: {{count}} ratings will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
ratings.publishableHint: Only ratings ≥4★ with a comment can be published.

wilayahReport.regencyHint: Store area reference — used by this report and the district picker in POS & booking
wilayahReport.noDataDescPart2: with visit data in this period.
wilayahReport.noDataHint: Make sure customers fill in complete area data at registration.
wilayahReport.featureOffDesc: Visit & revenue analysis per district/village is available on higher plans. Upgrade your plan to unlock this feature.
wilayahReport.pageSubtitle: Customer visit analysis by district and village
wilayahReport.configOnceDesc: Pick the focus regency/city. The report shows a district and village breakdown automatically. This area is saved to your store account — and serves as the district picker reference when the cashier & booking customers fill in data. Can be changed anytime.
wilayahReport.kecamatanFoundHint: {{count}} districts found · Click to see villages

whatsappLogs.title: WhatsApp Messages
whatsappLogs.subtitle: Monitor the delivery status of WhatsApp notifications to admins & customers.
whatsappLogs.loadFailedHint: Check your connection and try again.
whatsappLogs.emptyFilteredHint: Try changing or resetting the filter.
whatsappLogs.emptyNoneHint: WhatsApp messages sent by the system will appear here.
whatsappLogs.resendNotePre: The message is resent with the same content. Make sure the store WhatsApp is
whatsappLogs.resendNotePost: (WhatsApp Beta tab) — if disconnected, sending will fail again.
whatsappLogs.recipientHint: Can be changed if the previous number was wrong.
whatsappLogs.legacyBodyWarning: This message was sent before the resend feature was active, so only its summary was stored. Complete the content before sending.

payroll.notActiveDesc: Calculate barber commissions & salaries per period automatically, complete with slips and export — available in the Enterprise plan.
payroll.title: Commission & Payroll
payroll.emptyState: No barber transactions in this period yet.
payroll.footnote: Commission is calculated from the revenue of services performed by the barber in the selected period. Fixed-salary barbers use their base pay (assuming a 1-month period). Bonuses/deductions are not saved — fill them in when you're about to pay, then export/print.

invoicePrint.notFound: Invoice not found or you don't have permission to access it.
invoicePrint.footerElectronic: This invoice is issued electronically and is valid without a wet signature.
invoicePrint.footerSupport: Billing-related questions: contact support via the Tickets menu in the app.

tickets.title: Support Tickets
tickets.subtitle: Contact the SembaPOS platform support team
tickets.emptyList: No tickets yet. Click "New Ticket" to contact support.
tickets.replyPlaceholder: Add more information or a follow-up question...
tickets.resolvedNotice: This ticket has been resolved by the support team.
tickets.selectPrompt: Select a ticket to view details
tickets.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the problem in detail, reproduction steps, etc.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.wizardConfirmNote: The tenant will be created and default features for package {{pkg}} will be enabled automatically. Activation email will be sent to
tenants.deleteConfirm: Delete tenant {{name}}? Data will be soft-deleted.
tenants.emptyDesc: Click "Add Tenant" to onboard a new tenant.
tenants.emptyFilterDesc: Try changing or clearing the filters to see other results.

packages.title: Subscription Packages
packages.pageSubtitle: Set price, quotas, and additional branch fees for each subscription package
packages.infoBanner: Package price changes are not retroactive — existing subscribers keep their old price until the next renewal. Branch addon fees apply immediately to new additions.
packages.maxBranchesHint: Extra branches beyond this are charged an addon fee
packages.branchAddonSubtitle: (charged when tenant adds a branch beyond quota)
packages.addonPreview: Tenants on <1>{{name}}</1> package will be charged <3>{{price}}</3> {{typeLabel}} each time they add a branch beyond the free quota of {{maxBranches}} branches.
packages.comparisonSubtitle: These features are enabled automatically on tenant onboarding. Can be adjusted per-tenant in the Feature Flags page.

broadcast.title: Broadcast
broadcast.pageSubtitle: Send messages to all or selected tenants
broadcast.empty: No broadcasts yet. Click "Send Broadcast" to get started.
broadcast.confirmDeleteDesc: Broadcast "{{title}}" will be permanently removed from every recipient tenant.
broadcast.confirmDeactivateDesc: Broadcast "{{title}}" will stop appearing in tenant notification drawers. You can reactivate it later.

promotions.pageSubtitle: Create & manage promotions for renewals, upgrades, or branch add-ons
promotions.empty: No promo codes yet. Click "New promo" to create one.
promotions.scopeNote: Empty scope = applies to all. Each tenant can use a code once.
promotions.confirmDeactivateDesc: Tenants will no longer be able to use this code. Redemption history is preserved.
promotions.validationCodeMin: Code must be at least 3 characters

featureFlags.title: Feature Flags
featureFlags.pageSubtitle: Enable or disable features per tenant — changes propagate to tenants live
featureFlags.toastReset: Feature flags reset to defaults for package {{pkg}}
featureFlags.selectTenantHint: Select a tenant to manage features
featureFlags.confirmResetDesc: All flags will be reset to {{pkg}} package defaults. Custom changes will be lost.
featureFlags.confirmCopyDesc: This tenant's feature configuration will be overwritten with {{name}}'s configuration.
featureFlags.confirmBulkOffDesc: All features in the {{category}} category will be disabled for this tenant.

activityLog.title: Activity Log
activityLog.pageSubtitle: History of all platform actions — realtime
activityLog.confirmPurgeDesc: Audit logs older than {{days}} days will be permanently deleted.
activityLog.noLogsHint: Platform actions will appear here in realtime.

usage.title: Platform Usage
usage.pageSubtitle: Activity, login sessions and feature adoption across tenants
usage.emptyTenants: No tenants yet. Create one to start tracking usage.

errorLog.pageSubtitle: Monitor API, JS, and system errors in realtime
errorLog.confirmDeleteAllDesc: This permanently deletes every error log and cannot be undone.
errorLog.confirmDeleteOldDesc: Error logs older than {{days}} days will be permanently deleted.
errorLog.confirmDeleteResolvedDesc: All resolved error logs will be permanently deleted.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.pageSubtitle: Manage account information and platform admin security settings
profile.twoFADesc: Protect your account with Google Authenticator codes
profile.scanQr: Scan QR Code with Google Authenticator
profile.toastPwdMinLen: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.title: Platform Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor performance across all SembaPOS tenants
dashboard.healthScoreNote: Score is computed from subscription status, remaining active period, and auto-renew.

billing.pageSubtitle: Manage packages and payments for all tenants

tickets.title: Support Tickets
tickets.subtitle: Contact the SembaPOS platform support team
tickets.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the issue in detail, reproduction steps, etc.
tickets.selectTicket: Select a ticket to view details
tickets.noTickets: No tickets yet. Click "Create Ticket" to contact support.
tickets.writeReplyAdmin: Write a reply as Platform Admin…
tickets.ticketResolved: This ticket has been resolved by the support team.

toast.created: Ticket submitted! The support team will respond shortly.

tickets.saPageSubtitle: Manage requests and reports from every tenant — realtime
tickets.selectTicketHint: Select a ticket to view detail
tickets.confirmDeleteDesc: The ticket and all replies will be permanently deleted.
tickets.confirmResolveDesc: The ticket will be closed and the tenant cannot reply again.

realtime.liveTooltip: Real-time connected — click to refresh manually

appUpdate.title: New version available
appUpdate.description: Reload the page to use the latest version. Make sure to save any data you're entering first.

kasirRatings.title: Customer Ratings
kasirRatings.subtitle: Ratings received for this branch from the public rating page.

mySchedule.title: My Schedule
mySchedule.subtitle: Your work schedule — next 7 days and weekly pattern.
mySchedule.weeklyPatternHint: Regular working hours per day (editable by admin).

staffAttendance.title: Digital Attendance
staffAttendance.disabledDesc: Digital Attendance is not available on your current shop plan.
staffAttendance.gpsUnsupported: This device does not support GPS.
staffAttendance.gpsDenied: Location permission denied. Enable GPS and allow location access in your browser.
staffAttendance.gpsTimeout: Location request timed out. Try again in an area with a better signal.
staffAttendance.gpsFailed: Failed to read GPS location. Make sure GPS is on.
staffAttendance.checkInSuccess: Check-in successful. Have a great shift!
staffAttendance.idleDesc: Tap the button below to clock in.
staffAttendance.selfieNotice: You'll be asked to take a selfie.
staffAttendance.noBranchAssigned: You are not assigned to a branch yet.
staffAttendance.branchNotConfiguredWarn: Attendance can't be used until the admin sets the branch coordinates.

ratingsReport.loadError: Failed to load rating data. Check your connection and try again.
